sections.heading: Overview
sections.body: This Privacy Policy explains how Velora collects, uses, and protects the personal information you share with us when you visit our locations, browse our website, place an order, or make a reservation. By using our services you agree to the practices described here.

sections.heading: Information We Collect
sections.body: We collect information you provide directly — such as your name, email address, phone number, and reservation or order details. We also collect limited technical information automatically, including your device type, browser, and pages visited, in order to improve our website.

sections.heading: How We Use Your Information
sections.body: Your information is used to process reservations and orders, respond to enquiries, send you updates you have opted into, and improve our menu and service. We never sell your personal data to third parties.

sections.heading: Data Retention
sections.body: We retain personal information only for as long as necessary to provide our services and to comply with legal obligations. You may request that we delete your data at any time by contacting us.

sections.heading: Your Rights
sections.body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete the personal information we hold about you, and to withdraw consent for marketing communications. To exercise these rights, please contact us using the details on our contact page.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.body: If you have questions about this policy or how your data is handled, reach out to us at hello@velora.com and our team will respond promptly.

sections.heading: What Are Cookies
sections.body: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help the site remember your preferences and understand how visitors use our pages so we can improve the experience.

sections.heading: How We Use Cookies
sections.body: Velora uses essential cookies to keep the site functioning, preference cookies to remember choices such as your language and theme, and analytics cookies to understand which pages are most useful to our guests.

sections.heading: Managing Cookies
sections.body: You can accept or decline non-essential cookies using the banner shown on your first visit. You can also control or delete cookies through your browser settings at any time, though some features may not work as intended if disabled.

sections.heading: Third-Party Cookies
sections.body: Some cookies may be set by third-party services we use, such as embedded maps or analytics. These providers have their own privacy and cookie policies which we encourage you to review.

sections.heading: Updates
sections.body: We may update this Cookies Policy from time to time. Any changes will be reflected on this page with a revised update date.

sections.heading: Acceptance of Terms
sections.body: By accessing the Velora website, placing an order, or making a reservation, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree, please refrain from using our services.

sections.heading: Reservations and Orders
sections.body: Reservations are subject to availability and confirmation. Orders placed online are prepared once confirmed. We reserve the right to cancel or refuse any order or reservation at our discretion, in which case any payment taken will be refunded.

sections.heading: Pricing and Payment
sections.body: All prices are listed in the local currency and include applicable taxes unless otherwise stated. Prices and menu items may change without prior notice. Payment is processed securely at the time of order.

sections.heading: Cancellations
sections.body: Reservations may be cancelled or modified up to two hours before the booking time at no charge. For large parties or private events, separate terms may apply and will be communicated in advance.

sections.heading: Intellectual Property
sections.body: All content on this website, including text, imagery, branding, and design, is the property of Velora and may not be reproduced without our written permission.

sections.heading: Limitation of Liability
sections.body: Velora is not liable for any indirect or consequential loss arising from the use of our website or services, to the fullest extent permitted by law. Nothing in these terms limits liability that cannot be limited under applicable law.
